title: The Vassalage Network
attention: This vassalage programme is not intended for referral of "family members" or "clients." Please read {faqLink} before proceeding.
earnDescription: By appending a dispatch to InterServer upon your estate's banner, you shall receive {amount} tribute on each new commission we receive that results from subjects clicking the dispatch upon your estate's banner.
shareUrl: Share your unique vassalage dispatch URL with fellow subjects

signups.title: Vassalage Pledges
signups.noRecords: The royal archives hold no such record

status.title: Standing
status.defaultDesc: Subject is registered under a vassal but has not yet completed the requirements.
status.pendingDesc: Subject has met time and tribute requirements, and is awaiting royal verification.
status.failedDesc: Subject did not meet requirements or vassal violated the terms in obtaining the subject.
status.lockedDesc: Subject's account in the royal ledger is locked and no longer viable.
status.rejectedDesc: Account has permanently failed to meet the requirements.
status.paidDesc: Vassal has already received tribute for this subject's pledge.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.a1: We render $100 flat tribute per commission, and this is one of the highest-paying vassalage programmes.
faqPage.q2: 2. How long does it take for a commission to appear in my account in the royal ledger?
faqPage.q3: 3. I just received a commission. Where can I see it?
faqPage.a3_step2: On the bottom right side you will see an option View Vassalage Page.
faqPage.a3_step3: Here you can see all of your awaiting and approved tributes.
faqPage.q4: 4. I know a subject who needs hosting. How do I earn a referral tribute?
faqPage.a4_step2: Scroll down to the bottom to see your vassalage dispatch link.
faqPage.a4_step3: Send this dispatch to your acquaintance who needs hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: When they click on that dispatch and commission an account with us, you earn a tribute.
faqPage.q5: 5. I've been approved for the InterServer Hosting vassalage programme. Now what do I do?
faqPage.a5_step1: Swear fealty to your vassalage account to access InterServer's marketing materials by clicking the Banners and Dispatches tab.
faqPage.a5_step2: Choose the marketing material you would like to append to your estate.
faqPage.a5_step3: You will see banner codes on the right side of all banners; duplicate and paste this code to your estate.
faqPage.a5_step4: When a subject clicks on that dispatch and commissions a hosting account, you earn a tribute.
faqPage.q6: 6. Can I conduct PPC bidding to promote InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Aye, but please do not bid on our royal name, variation of our royal name, misspelling, or any keyword containing a portion of it including InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Focus on bids for keywords like swift hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Please send a carrier pigeon to us if you need assistance brainstorming keywords.
faqPage.a6_line4: Make sure to add InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting as negative campaign keywords.
faqPage.q7: 7. I've received a commission. Now when do I receive tribute?
faqPage.a7_line1: After 90 days a valid commission will change from standing Default to Awaiting Royal Approval.
faqPage.a7_line2: Once the commission is Awaiting Royal Approval it will be paid during the first 7 days of the month.
faqPage.q8: 8. I have a pending commission that did not receive tribute.
faqPage.a8_line1: There might be a few reasons for this. Sometimes we need more time to validate a commission.
faqPage.a8_line2: One easy thing to check is to make sure your tribute payment method is established.
faqPage.q9: 9. How long do my commissions/tributes remain pending until they are approved?
faqPage.q10: 10. Can I use my vassalage dispatch for self-referrals on accounts I'll use for personal use?
faqPage.a10: Nay. Any contact with a resold account will result in automatic failure of the commission.
faqPage.a11_intro: Rejected means the tribute has failed permanently.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Some reasons for this could be:
faqPage.a11_reason1: The subject has already pledged allegiance with us in the past.
faqPage.a11_reason2: The same payment token was used as another account in the royal ledger.
faqPage.a11_reason3: The royal scribes detected that you, the vassal, are also using the subject's account.
faqPage.a11_policy: Since our tribute of $100 per commission is often far more than we recover from the subject even after 1 year, we have a strict royal decree in place to catch referrals that do not meet our guidelines. If you are referring a companion or a client, simply give them a dispatch or a coupon. Do not share payment tokens and do not use the account.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Also please review our vassalage terms here:
faqPage.q12: 12. I am a designer/developer and will refer subjects. Is that acceptable?
faqPage.a12_line1: This plan is not going to work with us (or any other hosting vassalage programme). Once there are matches made across multiple accounts, the tributes fail.
faqPage.a12_line2: This is done to prevent the same person from pledging allegiance and earning tribute from our vassalage programme by referring themselves.
faqPage.a12_line3: You might wish to consider hosting the subjects directly and billing them yourself using something like PayPal. You can commission a reseller hosting account from us and commence.
faqPage.q13: 13. Where can I establish my tribute payment?
faqPage.a13: You can establish your tribute payment,
